case_title: MONICA LIMING ZHUANG VS. JASON WONG

calendar.matters:
Motion To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Oct-11-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Robert Henry Staley, Esq. of Epstein Englert Staley & Coffey, Tel. 415.398.6392, for petitioner and moving party;
No other appearance.

RULING: There being no objection, the Court adopted its tentative ruling on PETITIONER MONICA ZHUANG'S Motion To Confirm Arbitration Award as follows: Claimant Monica Zhuang's motion to confirm arbitration award is granted. No opposition filed.

Order and Judgment were signed in open court.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Reporter: Reyes Hunter CSR #6576 email: rhunter@sftc.org.
